sanskrit: वृष्णीनां वासुदेवोऽस्मि पाण्डवानां धनंजयः । मुनीनामप्यहं व्यासः कवीनामुशना कविः ॥
hindiTranslation: वृष्णिवंशियोंमें वासुदेव और पाण्डवोंमें धनञ्जय मैं हूँ ।  मुनियोंमें वेदव्यास और कवियोंमें कवि शुक्राचार्य भी मैं हूँ ॥
englishTranslation: Among the Vrishnis I am Vasudeva; among the Pandavas I am Dhananjaya. Among sages I am Vyasa, and among poets I am Ushana, the poet.
essence: Greatness in many forms is one presence showing itself.
speaker: Krishna
